title: Benchmark Result v1
description: The empirical trust signal. Neutral runner executes a test suite against a product listing and emits this signed result. No seller involvement.

suite_id.description: Standard benchmark suite id · e.g. mcp-basic-v1, sdk-import-v1, api-uptime-30d, tool-load-v1, buyer-supplied-v1, public-safe-v1

score.description: Normalized 0..1 score · weight applied downstream in reputation calc

weight.description: Suite weight for reputation aggregation · default 1.0

runner_did.description: DID of the neutral test runner

buyer_test_case_hash.description: SHA-256 of the buyer-supplied test case (present when runner_kind=buyer-supplied)

sig.description: Ed25519 signature by runner_did over the canonical JSON (excluding sig)
